Updated.description: The timestamp of when the record was last updated (in US Eastern Time)

UpdatedUtc.description: The timestamp of when the record was last updated (in UTC Time)

Games.description: Total number of games played by the player in the game

Minutes.description: Total minutes played by the player in the game

Goals.description: Total goals scored by the player in the game

Assists.description: Total assists scored by the player in the game

Shots.description: Total shots attempted by the player in the game

ShotsOnGoal.description: Total shots on goal attempted by the player in the game

YellowCards.description: Total yellow cards against the player in the game

RedCards.description: Total red cards against by the player in the game

YellowRedCards.description: Total double yellow cards against the player in the game. Note: A double yellow card results in a red card

Crosses.description: Total crosses by the player in the game. Note: a cross means a pass from a wide area of the field towards the center of the field near the opponent's goal.

TacklesWon.description: Total tackles won by the player in the game

Interceptions.description: Total interceptions made by the player in the game

OwnGoals.description: Total goals scored against own team (accidentally)

Fouls.description: Total fouls made by the player in the game

Fouled.description: Total times the player was fouled in the game

Offsides.description: Total offsides against by the player in the game

Passes.description: Total passes attempted by the player in the game

PassesCompleted.description: Total passes completed by the player in the game

LastManTackle.description: Total tackles made by the player when there is no one else available to stop the opponent from scoring in the game

CornersWon.description: Total corner kicks awarded to the player in the game

BlockedShots.description: Total shots blocked by the player in the game

Touches.description: Total times the player touched the ball in the game

DefenderCleanSheets.description: Total defender clean sheets by the player in the game. Note: clean sheets are awarded when zero goals were allowed to the opponent and the player played at least 60 minutes).

GoalkeeperSaves.description: Total saves made by goalkeeper in the game

GoalkeeperGoalsAgainst.description: Total goals allowed by goalkeeper in the game

GoalkeeperSingleGoalAgainst.description: Total games where the goalkeeper allowed exactly one goal in the game

GoalkeeperCleanSheets.description: Total number of clean sheets by the goalkeeper in the game. Note: Awarded when zero goals were allowed to the opponent and the player played at least 60 minutes

GoalkeeperWins.description: Total wins by the goalkeeper in the game

PenaltyKickGoals.description: Total penalty kick goals scored by the player in the game

PenaltyKickMisses.description: Total penalty kicks missed by the player in the game

PenaltyKickSaves.description: Total penalty kicks saved by the player in the game

PenaltiesWon.description: Total penalties won by the player in the game

PenaltiesConceded.description: Total penalties conceded by the player in the game

Score.description: Total goals scored by the player's team in the game

OpponentScore.description: Total goals scored against own team by the player in the game

Tackles.description: Total tackles by the player in the game

GameId.description: The unique ID of the game

OpponentId.description: The unique ID of the team's opponent

Opponent.description: The name of the opponent team

DateTime.description: The date and time of the game (in UTC)

HomeOrAway.description: Whether the team is the home team or away team

IsGameOver.description: Whether the game is over (true) or not (false)

GlobalGameId.description: A globally unique ID for this game. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.

GlobalOpponentId.description: A globally unique ID for this opponent. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.

StatId.description: The unique ID of the stat associated with this player

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this record corresponds to (1=Regular Season, 2=Preseason, 3=Postseason, 4=Offseason, 5=AllStar).

Season.description: The soccer regular season for which these totals apply

RoundId.description: The unique ID of the round that this player is associated with

TeamId.description: The unique ID of the team

PlayerId.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID stays with the player their entire career

ShortName.description: The short name of the player

Team.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the player's team

Position.description: The position of the player. Possible values include: A (Attacker); M (Midfielder); D (Defender); GK (Goalkeeper)

Started.description: The total number of games the player started

Captain.description: Whether the player is a captain (true/false)

Suspension.description: Whether the player is suspended or not (true/false)

SuspensionReason.description: The reason given for the player's suspension

GlobalTeamId.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.
